description: Find cell content and replace by different content in a replacement table

value.label: Input Value
value.show_if: this.condition == 'CONTAINS' || this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition == '=' || this.condition == 'STARTS WITH' || this.condition == 'ENDS WITH' || this.condition == 'REGEX MATCH' || this.condition == 'NOT REGEX MATCH' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE'

case_sensitive.label: Case Sensitive
case_sensitive.show_if: this.condition == 'CONTAINS' || this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition == '=' || this.condition == 'STARTS WITH' || this.condition == 'ENDS WITH' || this.condition == 'REGEX MATCH' || this.condition == 'NOT REGEX MATCH' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE'

apply_columns_frame.style: border: 1px solid #ccc; color: #2C3E50;line-height: 0.9; border-radius: 3px; font-family: montserrat;font-size:13 px

compare_with.label: Compare with
compare_with.show_if: this.condition=='CONTAINS' || this.condition=='CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition=='STARTS WITH' || this.condition=='ENDS WITH' || this.condition=='=' || this.condition=='>' || this.condition=='>=' || this.condition=='<' || this.condition=='<='

self_compare_column.label: Select Compare Column
self_compare_column.show_if: search_tables=='false' && this.compare_with=='column_value' && (this.condition=='CONTAINS' || this.condition=='CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition=='STARTS WITH' || this.condition=='ENDS WITH' || this.condition=='=' || this.condition=='>' || this.condition=='>=' || this.condition=='<' || this.condition=='<=')

search_tables__self_compare_column_text.label: Input Compare Column Name
search_tables__self_compare_column_text.show_if: search_tables=='true' && search_tables__select_columns_by=='by_name_text' && this.compare_with=='column_value' && (this.condition=='CONTAINS' || this.condition=='CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition=='STARTS WITH' || this.condition=='ENDS WITH' || this.condition=='=' || this.condition=='>' || this.condition=='>=' || this.condition=='<' || this.condition=='<=')

search_tables__self_compare_column_order.label: Select Compare Column
search_tables__self_compare_column_order.show_if: search_tables=='true' && search_tables__select_columns_by=='by_order' && this.compare_with=='column_value' && (this.condition=='CONTAINS' || this.condition=='CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition=='STARTS WITH' || this.condition=='ENDS WITH' || this.condition=='=' || this.condition=='>' || this.condition=='>=' || this.condition=='<' || this.condition=='<=')

value.label: Input Value
value.show_if: this.compare_with=='custom_value' && this.condition != 'DATE' && this.condition != 'EMPTY' && this.condition != 'NOT EMPTY' && this.condition != 'BLANK' && this.condition != 'NOT BLANK' && this.condition != 'IS NULL' && this.condition != 'IS NOT NULL' && this.condition != 'IS TRUE' && this.condition != 'IS FALSE' && this.condition != 'CONTAINED IN TABLE' && this.condition != 'NOT CONTAINED IN TABLE' && this.condition != 'IN REGEX TABLE' && this.condition != 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE'

case_sensitive.label: Select Case Sensitive
case_sensitive.show_if: this.condition == 'CONTAINS' || this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN STRING' || this.condition == '=' || this.condition == 'STARTS WITH' || this.condition == 'ENDS WITH' || this.condition == 'REGEX MATCH' || this.condition == 'NOT REGEX MATCH' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE'

compare_table_id.label: Select Table
compare_table_id.show_if: this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE'

compare_column.label: Select Compare Column
compare_column.show_if: search_tables=='false' && (this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE')

search_tables__compare_column_text.label: Input Compare Column Name
search_tables__compare_column_text.show_if: search_tables=='true' && search_tables__select_columns_by=='by_name_text' && (this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE')

search_tables__compare_column_order.label: Select Compare Column
search_tables__compare_column_order.show_if: search_tables=='true' && search_tables__select_columns_by=='by_order' && (this.condition == 'CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT CONTAINED IN TABLE' || this.condition == 'IN REGEX TABLE' || this.condition == 'NOT IN REGEX TABLE')

replacement_table_notice.val: Line-break will be ignored in replacement table
